column1: # sb-oracle harvest — bead sb-interpreter-ltz · 2026-06-26 · run_case.py batch
# All 7 Class-1 statement keywords as sole RHS (`A=<KW>`) under OPTION STRICT.
# PLUS the non-STRICT `A=FOO` baseline proving errnum 48 is NOT a generic
# uninit-read — ordinary uninit reads as 0 (NOERR); only a Class-1 KW bareword
# sole-RHS trips 48 non-STRICT. See ctm_bareword_kw.tsv for the non-STRICT KW set.
# Conclusion: the bareword-KW-as-sole-RHS is a SPECIAL form, not a general
# uninit-var mechanism. Under STRICT it routes through the normal undeclared-var
# path -> 15; under default mode it routes to a dedicated 48 (Uninitialized
# variable used) rather than the silent auto-init-0 a plain name gets.
